retry_reason: The operation is unconditional and always succeeds (or is a safe no-op on NULL pointers). No retry scenario.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases all firmware references held by the device structure (ucode, pcm, initvals, initvals_band) and sets the pointers to NULL. It must be called during device teardown to properly free the firmware. After calling, the firmware pointers must not be used again. The caller is responsible for ensuring no concurrent access to these pointers after release.
